subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 3: Language - Grammar
description: Thì hiện tại hoàn thành và so sánh kép

theory.title: Grammar: Present Perfect and Double Comparatives

sections.heading: A. Present Perfect Tense (Thì hiện tại hoàn thành)
sections.content:
1. Cấu trúc:

  • Khẳng định: S + have/has + V3/ed
  • Ex: Urbanisation has increased rapidly.
  • Ex: Many people have moved to cities.
  • Phủ định: S + have/has not (haven't/hasn't) + V3/ed
  • Ex: The government hasn't solved the problem yet.
  • Nghi vấn: Have/Has + S + V3/ed?
  • Ex: Have you visited the new urban area?

2. Cách dùng:

  • Hành động bắt đầu trong quá khứ, tiếp tục đến hiện tại:
  • Ex: I have lived in this city for 10 years. (vẫn đang sống)
  • Ex: Traffic congestion has been a problem since 2010.
  • Hành động vừa mới xảy ra (just, recently, lately):
  • Ex: The city has just opened a new metro line.
  • Kinh nghiệm đến hiện tại (ever, never, before):
  • Ex: Have you ever been to a slum area?
  • Hành động đã hoàn thành, kết quả còn ở hiện tại (already, yet):
  • Ex: They have already built new housing. (nhà đã xây xong)
  • Ex: We haven't finished the project yet.

3. Dấu hiệu nhận biết:

  • For + khoảng thời gian: for 5 years, for a long time
  • Since + mốc thời gian: since 2010, since last year
  • Already, yet, just, recently, lately, ever, never, before, so far, up to now

sections.heading: B. Double Comparatives (So sánh kép)
sections.content:
1. Cấu trúc:

  • The + comparative + S + V, the + comparative + S + V
  • Nghĩa: Càng... thì càng...

2. Với tính từ/trạng từ ngắn:

  • The + adj/adv-er + S + V, the + adj/adv-er + S + V
  • Ex: The bigger the city is, the more crowded it becomes.
  • Ex: The faster urbanisation happens, the worse the problems get.

3. Với tính từ/trạng từ dài:

  • The more + adj/adv + S + V, the more + adj/adv + S + V
  • Ex: The more expensive housing becomes, the harder it is to afford.
  • Ex: The more rapidly cities expand, the more difficult planning becomes.

4. Với danh từ:

  • The more + noun + S + V, the more + noun + S + V
  • Ex: The more people migrate, the more problems arise.
  • Ex: The more infrastructure we build, the better life becomes.

5. Các trường hợp đặc biệt:

  • good → better: The better the planning, the better the results.
  • bad → worse: The worse the traffic, the more stressed people feel.
  • many/much → more: The more money invested, the faster development happens.
  • little → less: The less space available, the higher the prices.

exercises.question: Choose the correct form: 'The city _____ a lot in recent years.'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect 'has changed' vì có 'in recent years'.

exercises.question: Complete: 'I _____ in this city for 10 years.'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect 'have lived' với 'for 10 years'.

exercises.question: Choose the correct sentence:
options: The bigger the city, the more crowded it becomes.
The bigger city, more crowded it becomes.
Bigger the city, crowded it becomes.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc so sánh kép đúng: The + comparative..., the + comparative...

exercises.question: Complete: 'They _____ the new metro line yet.'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect negative 'haven't opened' với 'yet'.

exercises.question: Choose the correct form: 'The more people migrate, the _____ housing becomes.'
exercises.explanation: So sánh kép với tính từ dài: the more expensive.

exercises.question: Complete: '_____ you ever _____ to a big city?'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect 'Have you ever been' cho kinh nghiệm.

exercises.question: Choose the correct form: 'The _____ the city grows, the _____ problems arise.'
exercises.explanation: So sánh kép: The faster..., the more...

exercises.question: Complete: 'Urbanisation _____ rapidly since 2000.'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect 'has increased' với 'since 2000'.

exercises.question: Choose the correct sentence:
options: The more money we invest, the better infrastructure we have.
More money we invest, better infrastructure we have.
The money more, the infrastructure better.
More the money, better the infrastructure.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc so sánh kép với danh từ: The more + noun..., the + comparative...

exercises.question: Complete: 'She _____ just _____ from the countryside.'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect 'has just moved' với 'just'.

exercises.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I have lived here for 5 years.
I am living here for 5 years.
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect 'have lived' cho hành động từ quá khứ đến hiện tại.

exercises.question: Complete: 'The _____ traffic gets, the _____ people feel.'
exercises.explanation: So sánh kép: The worse..., the more stressed...

exercises.question: Choose the correct form: 'Many high-rise buildings _____ in the city.'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect passive 'have been built'.

exercises.question: Complete: 'The _____ the population, the _____ resources we need.'
exercises.explanation: So sánh kép: The larger..., the more...

exercises.question: Which is correct with 'already'?
options: Both B and C are correct.
exercises.explanation: 'Already' có thể đứng giữa 'have' và V3, hoặc cuối câu.

exercises.question_text: Decide if these sentences use Present Perfect correctly (True/False):
options: Have you ever been to Hanoi?
exercises.explanation: a) True - đúng cấu trúc với 'since'. b) True - đúng với 'just'. c) False - phải dùng 'moved' (quá khứ đơn) với 'last year'. d) True - đúng với 'ever'.

exercises.question_text: Decide if these double comparatives are correct (True/False):
options: The bigger the city, the more crowded it is.
The more people, the more problems.
The city bigger, it crowded more.
The better the planning, the better the results.
exercises.explanation: a) True - đúng cấu trúc. b) True - đúng với danh từ. c) False - sai cấu trúc. d) True - đúng với 'better'.

exercises.question_text: Complete: I _____ (live) in this city for 5 years. (use Present Perfect)
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect: have lived (với 'for 5 years').

exercises.question_text: Complete: The _____ (big) the city, the _____ (crowded) it becomes.
exercises.explanation: So sánh kép: The bigger..., the more crowded...

exercises.question_text: Complete: She _____ (just/move) to the city. (use Present Perfect)
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect: has just moved (với 'just').
